# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextApiRequest, NextApiResponse } from 'next';
import * as Cookies from 'cookies-next';

const isAuth = async (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) => {
    const cookies = new Cookies(req, res);
    if (cookies.get('token')) {
        // Token exists
    } else {
        return false;
    }
};

export default async function authMiddleware(req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) {
    const isAuthStatus = await isAuth(req, res);

    if (isAuthStatus === true) {
        // Allow authenticated request
    } else {
        try {
            const token = req.cookies['token'];
            if (!token || token.length === 0) return res.status(401).json({ message: 'Unauthorized' });
        } catch (err) {
            console.error(err);
            return res.status(500).json({ message: 'Internal Server Error' });
        }
    }
};
